title: Deepmazed
description: Deepmazed is a minimal Forge version of Optimazed which I made for Fabric. This modpack is focused on true performance, just like it's brother.
body:
Deepmazed modpack (just like it's brother Optimazed) is designed to provide the most efficient enviroment what is possible, without other features that slows the game.

It provides (for example) Dynamic FPS to minimize the FPS while running background or FPS Reducer while you're AFK.

If you are on a large server, you should not experience much FPS drop, because multiple mods are made for keeping FPS count on the maximum on these servers.

If you experience long ping time for servers, this modpack fixes that, so you'll be able to know if a server is offline or not.

If you have lower hardware, you will experience FPS raise in singleplayer or in servers. Of course you can download this on good hardware too, then you may experience more performance than the default vanilla game.

_NOTE: THIS IS A FORGE PORT OF OPTIMAZED, SO HERE ARE LESS OPTIMIZATIONS AVAILABLE. IF YOU WANT TRUE PERFORMANCE, CHECK OUT [OPTIMAZED](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimazed). THIS MODPACK IS FOR EXTENDERS WHO WANT TO EXTEND OPTIMIZATION MODPACKS WITH MODS._
